layout: header with logo and navigation, left sidebar with menu, main content area with dashboard widgets (cards, charts, progress bars), no visible footer

palette.gradients: subtle blue-to-purple gradients on charts (e.g., line graphs, progress bars)

visual_style: dark premium with a focus on data visualization, using contrasting colors for readability and a sleek, professional aesthetic

ui_elements.buttons: rounded rectangles, primary buttons in accent color (#00d4ff), hover with slight opacity increase
ui_elements.cards: dark gray (#2a2b3e) with subtle shadows, rounded corners
ui_elements.nav: vertical sidebar with icons and text, active item highlighted

background: solid dark navy (#1a1b2e) with a subtle gradient border on the main container
spacing: normal spacing with a grid system for dashboard widgets, consistent padding between elements
unique_features: circular progress indicator (304.56) with gradient fill, interactive charts with hover effects, color-coded data points (blue, purple, orange) for differentiation
overall_mood: professional and data-driven, with a modern, tech-focused vibe
replication_notes: use CSS Grid/Flexbox for layout, implement custom chart libraries (e.g., Chart.js) for graphs, apply box shadows for depth, use CSS variables for color consistency
